positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial whale breaching through a vibrant crescent moon and constellation aurora. The whale has elegant, flowing bioluminescent details, and the moon's surface reflects stardust. Style should be modern, clean line art mixed with vibrant watercolor wash backgrounds. Composition must be highly central and symmetrical, suitable for a repeat pattern or single chest print. Dominant colors: deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal lavender, accented by bright cyan and gold leaf highlights. Strong contrast, high detail, perfect for apparel printing, isolated on white or transparent background.
negative: lowres, blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, signature, cartoonish, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, duplicate, poorly drawn, asymmetrical
